## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Build a searchable index supporting keyword + semantic + similarity search.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S01): Turn the static knowledge repository into an active decision-making system with mandatory retrieval, source citation, decision traces, memorialization, and a knowledge graph.

## THE ONE ACTION
Implement and build the index over ingested knowledge; capture a real sample query and its results.
